data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of multi-channel capabilities (email, SMS, push notification) for the marketing sequence builder. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm the implementation of SMS or push notifications, only mentioning email as part of the multi-channel strategy. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: Lack of evidence for SMS and push notification capabilities.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
